ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the site was established */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., forest, wetland, urban) */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last site survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the site (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., RHI5, RHI10, RGI5, RGI10) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., mm, m³) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data (e.g., sensor, manual measurement) */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the metric is measured (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "data_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the metric data (e.g., 0.1 mm, 1 m³) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric data was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the metric is currently being measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the measurement was taken */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric being measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was taken */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific data source (e.g., sensor ID) that collected the measurement */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the measurement (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the measurement to support versioning */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the measurement has been confirmed by a researcher */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the file is valid and can be used for analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., TXT, MD) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the file is valid and can be used for reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access attempt was successful */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to respond to the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
